message:
fix: make TUI history snapshot tests deterministic (bd-kps8)

Replace environment-dependent git history loading in snap_history_git_mode
and e2e_journey_history_deep_dive with pre-populated deterministic fixture
data via inject_deterministic_git_cache(). Tests no longer depend on real
repo git log output, eliminating flakiness across environments.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -45,64 +45,64 @@ c confidence >= 0% | v bead/git | / search | Tab mode | y copy | f file-tree | h
